evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 38153686. 2023/12/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Despite improvement in systemic therapy, patients with pancreatic 
ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) frequently experience local recurrence. We sought 
to determine the safety of hypofractionated proton beam radiation therapy (PBT) 
during adjuvant chemotherapy.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: Nine patients were enrolled in a single-institution phase 
1 trial (NCT03885284) between 2019 and 2022. Patients had PDAC of the pancreatic
